/usr/bin/g++    -g -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX10.14.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  CMakeFiles/Task4.dir/source_files/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Task4.dir/source_files/functions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Task4.dir/source_files/Fourier.cpp.o  -o ../Task4 /usr/X11R6/lib/libSM.dylib /usr/X11R6/lib/libICE.dylib /usr/X11R6/lib/libX11.dylib /usr/X11R6/lib/libXext.dylib
